bottomContent.select: Press 0 : Restructure object. Click and drag a vertex to change its position.

bottomContent.draw:
Left click on object : Select topmost object on currently active layer
Left Click and drag : Select all objects within an area on the currently active layer.
Left click and drag : Draw rectangle.
bottomContent.select: Press Delete/Backspace/2 : Deletes currently selected objects.

bottomContent.draw: Left click and drag : Draw ellipse.
bottomContent.select:
Press 3 : Recolour currently selected objects.
Colours based on currently selected colour in colour picker.
bottomContent.view: Right click and drag : Move camera.

bottomContent.draw:
Left click : Begin drawing polyline
Left Click again : Add vertex to polyline
Press 'Close' to complete the polyline or 'Cancel' to cancel it.
bottomContent.select: Press 4 : Pushes the currently selected objects up a layer.
bottomContent.view: Left click and drag : Move token.

bottomContent.draw:
Left click : Begin drawing wall
Left Click again : Add vertex to wall
Press 'Close' to complete the wall or 'Cancel' to cancel it.
bottomContent.select: Press 5 : Pushes the currently selected objects down a layer.

bottomContent.draw: Press 6 : Complete in progress polyline or wall object.
bottomContent.select:
Press 6 : Turn selected objects into tokens allowing players to move them
Name taken from current object template
Colour based on currently selected colour in colour picker.

bottomContent.draw: Press Escape/7 : Cancel creation of in progress object.
bottomContent.select:
Press 7 : Rename currently selected objects
Name taken from current object template
Objects must be tokens for this to be visible.
bottomContent.view:
Press 7 : Recolour laser.
Colour based on currently selected colour in colour picker.

bottomContent.select:
Press 8 : Recolour currently selected objects outlines.
Colour based on currently selected colour in colour picker.
Objects must be tokens for this to be visible.
bottomContent.view: Press 8 : Measure distance from cursor location.

bottomContent.select: Press 9 : Resize object. Click and drag a corner to resize.
